text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning and start my day with a glass of water and a short meditation. After breakfast, I prepare for work, which usually begins around 9 a.m. I spend most of the day at my desk, handling emails and attending meetings. In the late afternoon, I take a 30-minute walk or do some stretching to stay active. Evenings are for relaxing—I enjoy reading a book or watching a series before dinner. Consistency is important to me, so I try to follow this routine every day. It helps me feel balanced and productive.
